name: Renewal Risk Briefing Generator
description: Daily AI-generated risk briefings for every account with a renewal in the next 30/60/90 days. Pulls usage, sentiment, engagement — flags risks before they're a fire.
longDescription: Runs every weekday at 6 AM. Finds every contract renewing in the next 30, 60, or 90 days. For each, scans the last 90 days of product usage trend (Mixpanel), support ticket sentiment (Zendesk + OpenAI), exec sponsor engagement (calendar + email), and recent call sentiment (Gong). GPT-4 generates a 1-page renewal risk briefing — risk rating, top 3 signals, recommended save play, and a draft email to the champion. Emailed to the CSM in their inbox before they start their day.
